Afghanistan.notes: Visa is not required in case born in Afghanistan or can proof that one of their parents is a national of Afghanistan or born in Afghanistan.. e-Visa: Visitors must arrive at Kabul International (KBL)..

Albania.notes: Visa is not required for Holders of a valid multiple-entry Schengen, UK or US visa has been previously used once or residence permit of Ireland, Schengen, UK, US or UAE 10 years..

Andorra.notes: Visa free for a maximum stay of 90 days within 180 days for valid visa holders or residents of the Schengen Area member states..

Antigua and Barbuda.notes: Visa free for a maximum stay of 30 days for valid visa holders or residents of the Schengen Area member states, the United Kingdom, the United States and Canada..

Armenia.notes: Eligible for an eVisa if holding the following mandatory documents:. Travel (Medical) Insurance. A valid residence permit or valid visa issued by the EU and Schengen member states, the USA, Australia, New Zealand, the Republic of Korea, the UK, Canada, the Russian Federation, or Japan, or a valid residence permit issued by the GCC member states..

Australia.notes: May apply online (Online Visitor e600 visa)..

Azerbaijan.notes: Iraqi citizes are eligible to obtain a 30-day tourist Visa on Arrival if holding a residence permit issued by one of GCC state members. They must present their valid visa or residence permit along with their passport..

Bhutan.notes: Holders of an application for a tourist visa can obtain a visa on arrival..

Bosnia and Herzegovina.notes: Visa not required for 30 days if holding multiple-entry visa issued by Bulgaria, Croatia, Cyprus, Ireland (Rep.), Monaco, Romania, USA, United Kingdom or a Schengen Member State..

Cameroon.notes: Pre-arranged visa can be picked up on arrival..

Chad.notes: Pre-arranged visa can be picked up on arrival..

China.notes: 24-hour visa-free transit through any international airports of China (except Ürümqi ), allows domestic travel through different airports.. Visa on arrival for Macau SAR, China.

Republic of the Congo.notes: Visa not required if passengers have a V.I.P invitation letter..

Democratic Republic of the Congo.notes: Passenger with a letter (Visa Volant) issued by the Ministry of Interior and Security can obtain a visa on arrival..

Costa Rica.notes: Visa free for a maximum stay of 30 days for valid visa holders or residents of the United States and Canada..

Cuba.notes: Eligible to travel to Cuba with a tourist card only without visa if hold a valid visa or permanent residence permit issued by Canada, the United States or an EU member state..

Dominica.notes: Visa free for a maximum stay of 6 months for valid visa holders or residents of the Schengen Area member states, the United Kingdom, the United States and Canada..

Dominican Republic.notes: Visa free for a maximum stay of 90 days for valid visa holders or residents of the Schengen Area member states, the United Kingdom, Ireland, the United States and Canada..

Egypt.notes: Iraqi citizens with visa or residence cards from Europe or the United States, Canada, Britain and Australia can visit Egypt without a visa..

Eritrea.notes: Pre-arranged visa can be picked up on arrival..

Ethiopia.notes: Credit card payment transactions are not accepted when applying for e-Visa..

Gabon.notes: e-Visa holders must arrive via Libreville International Airport..

Gambia.notes: Visa not required if Passengers traveling as tourists on a charter flight..

Georgia.notes: eVisa available if holding a valid visa or residency permit from EEA Member State, Australia, Bermuda, Canada, GCC member state, Japan, Korea (Rep.), New Zealand, Switzerland, USA or United Kingdom..

Ghana.notes: Pre-arranged visa can be picked up on arrival..

Guyana.notes: Those travelling as tourists can obtain a visa on arrival for a maximum stay of 30 days provided holding a letter of invitation from sponsor or host..

Iran.notes: Visa cancellation between Iran and Iraq came into force on October 26, 2021..

Jordan.notes: Visa on arrival if having an official "Businessmen card" issued by Jordan or an official letter confirming the attendance to a conference or workshop.. Visa on arrival holding a residence permit issued by a country whose citizens can obtain a visa on arrival(except Lebanon) for 1 month maximum stay.. Visa on arrival if traveling for medical treatment for Female or Male older than 50 years and younger than 15 years..

Kazakhstan.notes: Visitors arriving from a country without Kazakh representation and holding an invitation letter, can obtain a single entry visa on arrival for a max. stay of 1 month..

Kenya.notes: Applications can be submitted up to 90 days prior to travel and must be submitted at least 3 days in advance.. eTA fee is 32.50 USD.. Proof of reservation at the hotel where visitors plan to stay is required (if staying with friends, an invitation letter is also acceptable).. Yellow fever vaccination certificate is required if coming from endemic countries..

Kuwait.notes: Passengers with a confirmation that a visa has been approved before departure can collect their original visa at immigration counter..

Kyrgyzstan.notes: e-Visa holders must arrive via Manas International Airport or Osh Airport or through land crossings with China (at Irkeshtam and Torugart ), Kazakhstan (at Ak-jol, Ak-Tilek, Chaldybar, Chon-Kapka ), Tajikistan (at Bor-Dobo, Kulundu, Kyzyl-Bel ) and Uzbekistan (at Dostuk )..

Liberia.notes: Pre-arranged visa can be picked up on arrival..

Mexico.notes: Visa free for a maximum stay of 180 days for valid visa holders or residents of the Schengen Area member states, the United Kingdom, the United States, Canada and Japan..

Moldova.notes: Citizens holding a residence permit or a valid visa issued by one of the member states of the European Union or one of the parties to the Schengen Agreement can apply for an electronic visa.. Invitation letter holders may apply for a visa electronically..

Mongolia.notes: Pre-arranged visa can be picked up on arrival..

Montenegro.notes: Visa free for a maximum stay of 30 days for valid visa holders or residents of the Schengen Area member states, the United Kingdom, Ireland and the United States..

Myanmar.notes: Passengers with a letter of approval issued by the Ministry of Hotels and Tourism can obtain a visa on arrival.

Nauru.notes: Pre-arranged visa can be picked up on arrival..

New Zealand.notes: Iraqi S series passports are unacceptable, and visas will not be endorsed in them.. Holders of an Australian Permanent Resident Visa or Resident Return Visa may be granted a New Zealand Resident Visa on arrival permitting indefinite stay (pursuant to the Trans-Tasman Travel Arrangement ), subject to meeting character requirements and obtaining an Electronic Travel Authority prior to departure..

Niger.notes: Pre-arranged visa can be picked up on arrival..

Nigeria.notes: Holders of written e-Visa approval issued by Immigration Authority can obtain a visa on arrival, provided holding a visa application form and e-Visa application payment receipt and holding an invitation letter from Nigerian company accepting immigration responsibilities..

North Macedonia.notes: Visa free for a maximum stay of 15 days for valid visa holders of the Schengen Area member states..

Pakistan.notes: Online Visa eligible.. Issued in 7-10 business days..

Panama.notes: Visa free for a maximum stay of 30 days for valid visa holders or residents of Australia, the United Kingdom, the United States and Canada..

Papua New Guinea.notes: Visitors may apply for a visa online under the "Tourist - Own Itinerary" category..

Philippines.notes: Residents of the United Arab Emirates may obtain an eVisa through the official Philippine eVisa website. A valid Emirati residence visa must be shown upon an eVisa application..

Qatar.notes: Visitors may apply for a visa on the Hayya website..

São Tomé and Príncipe.notes: Holders of a visa issued by the United States or a Schengen area member state do not require a visa for stays up to 15 days..

Senegal.notes: Visa not required for Passengers with an official invitation letter..

Serbia.notes: Visa free for a maximum stay of 90 days within 180 days for valid visa holders or residents of the Schengen Area member states, the United Kingdom, Ireland and the United States..

Seychelles.notes: Application can be submitted up to 30 days before travel.. Visitors must upload a reservation confirmation(s) for each visitor's location of stay in Seychelles.. Yellow fever vaccination certificate is required if coming from endemic countries.. Payment of the fee (EUR 10) by credit or debit card.. Valid for one journey only and it expires once exit the country..

Solomon Islands.notes: Pre-arranged visa can be picked up on arrival..

Somalia.notes: Available at Bosaso, Galcaio and Mogadishu airports..

South Sudan.notes: Obtainable online.. Printed visa authorization must be presented at the time of travel..

Sudan.notes: Passengers with an "Entry Permit" issued by the Sudanese Ministry of Interior can obtain a visa on arrival..

Suriname.notes: An entrance fee of USD 50 or EUR 50 must be paid online prior to arrival.. Multiple entry e-Visa is also available..

Tajikistan.notes: Pre-arranged visa can be picked up on arrival..

Trinidad and Tobago.notes: Pre-arranged visa can be picked up on arrival..

Turkey.notes: Visa not required for travelers Aged less than 15 and more than 50 years old ( Effective 1st of September 2024). Holders of a valid visa or residence permit from Schengen area countries, Ireland, the United Kingdom or the United States can apply for eVisa..

Uganda.notes: Determined at the port of entry..

Uzbekistan.notes: Pre-arranged visa can be picked up on arrival..

Venezuela.notes: Introduction of Electronic Visa System for Tourist and Business Travelers..

Vietnam.notes: e-Visa is valid for 90 days and multiple entry.. Prearranged visa obtained online through travel agencies available at Hanoi, Ho Chi Minh City, Phu Quoc or Da Nang airports.. Phú Quốc – visa exemption for up to 30 days..

Albania.notes: Visa is not required for Holders of a valid multiple-entry Schengen, UK or US visa has been previously used once or residence permit of Ireland, Schengen, UK, US or UAE 10 years..

Andorra.notes: Visa free for a maximum stay of 90 days within 180 days for valid visa holders or residents of the Schengen Area member states..

Antigua and Barbuda.notes: Visa free for a maximum stay of 30 days for valid visa holders or residents of the Schengen Area member states, the United Kingdom, the United States and Canada..

Bosnia and Herzegovina.notes: Visa not required for 30 days if holding multiple-entry visa issued by Bulgaria, Croatia, Cyprus, Ireland (Rep.), Monaco, Romania, USA, United Kingdom or a Schengen Member State..

Dominica.notes: Visa free for a maximum stay of 6 months for valid visa holders or residents of the Schengen Area member states, the United Kingdom, the United States and Canada..

Dominican Republic.notes: Visa free for a maximum stay of 90 days for valid visa holders or residents of the Schengen Area member states, the United Kingdom, Ireland, the United States and Canada..

Mexico.notes: Visa free for a maximum stay of 180 days for valid visa holders or residents of the Schengen Area member states, the United Kingdom, the United States, Canada and Japan..

Montenegro.notes: Visa free for a maximum stay of 30 days for valid visa holders or residents of the Schengen Area member states, the United Kingdom, Ireland and the United States..

North Macedonia.notes: Visa free for a maximum stay of 15 days for valid visa holders of the Schengen Area member states..

Serbia.notes: Visa free for a maximum stay of 90 days within 180 days for valid visa holders or residents of the Schengen Area member states, the United Kingdom, Ireland and the United States..

Turkey.notes: Visa not required for travelers Aged less than 15 and more than 50 years old ( Effective 1st of September 2024). Holders of a valid visa or residence permit from Schengen area countries, Ireland, the United Kingdom or the United States can apply for eVisa..
